## Summary of the AI Constitution Debate

The debate over the AI Constitution revealed a spectrum of perspectives on how to govern the development and integration of artificial intelligence. Core tensions emerged around the balance between individual liberty and collective well-being, the role of proactive regulation versus emergent order, and the necessity of global consensus versus pragmatic, iterative implementation.

**Key Points of Agreement and Conflict:**
